title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Bombay

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Bombay
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
